$comment: Optional dependencies for the JPEG XL graphics tier and the libsndfile OGG-music tier, resolved by vcpkg in manifest mode. This file is only consulted when CMake is configured with the vcpkg toolchain (-DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=.../vcpkg.cmake); a plain cmake build ignores it. See README.md. The *nix build normally uses system libjxl + libsndfile via pkg-config instead and needs none of this. NOTE: the MinGW-GCC libsndfile vendored in 3rdp/ (for SyncTERM) cannot link into this MSVC door -- an MSVC-native build (vcpkg, here) is required. Mirrors src/doors/syncdoom/vcpkg.json.
name: syncduke
description: Duke Nukem 3D for Synchronet / SyncTERM (DOOR32.SYS BBS door)
